commit_message: Warning when pins are not placed on routing grid Warning when pins are not placed on routing grid Instead of checking for min-width pins only, I check on all pins and see if they intersect with any routing track on their layer. If and only if none of the pins of a term intersect with any routing track, I fire a warning that this term has no pins on the routing grid.
